svg.title: CompleteControl CP437 16-segment glyph table
svg.desc: All 129 glyph indices in the S25 MK1 display table, each rendered as a real 16-segment cell with index, name, and native 16-bit mask.
svg.text: CP437-compatible 16-segment masks from shaduzlabs/cabl FONT_16-seg.h. Each cell shows the rendered glyph, its index, name, and native 16-bit mask.
